name: Oriental Openers
recipeInstructions:
1. For filling, stir together ricotta cheese, cream cheese, shredded radish, chives, and onion salt. Mix well. Set aside.
2. With a sharp knife, split pea pods open lengthwise.
3. Stuff each pea pod with the filling. To do this, place the filling in a clear plastic bag. Snip off one corner of the bag and squeeze the filling into each pea pod.
4. Chill until serving time.
